hooks.command: filepath=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$filepath" ] && echo "$filepath" | grep -q '\.go$'; then golangci-lint run --new-from-rev=HEAD --timeout=30s ./... 2>&1 | head -30; fi

filepath=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$filepath" ] && echo "$filepath" | grep -q '\.go$'; then dir=$(dirname "$filepath"); pkg="./${dir#$PWD/}"; go test "$pkg/..." -count=1 -timeout=30s 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
filepath=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$filepath" ] && echo "$filepath" | grep -qE '\.md$'; then markdownlint-cli2 "$filepath" 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
